title: $NO_BUSY
text: $NO_BUSY Disable the *busy* indicator. $NO_BUSY Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description $NO_BUSY disables the *busy* message. This can be useful when working with some benchmarking or terminal emulation software. You do not have to assign a value to $NO_BUSY . You can change the message associated with the *busy* indicator be defining it in the Toggle Symbols Language Setup. Example: $NO_BUSY [SETTINGS] $NO_BUSY Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
